landing.heroSubtitle: Turn lectures into flashcards with AI. Perfect for students who want to study smarter, not harder.
landing.fromLecturesToAs: From Lectures to A's in Minutes
landing.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to ace your exams
landing.recordLecturesDesc: Never miss a word. Record lectures and get AI-powered transcriptions instantly.
landing.autoFlashcardsDesc: AI generates flashcards from your notes automatically. Study mode included.
landing.practiceQuizzesDesc: Test your knowledge with AI-generated quizzes. Track your progress.
landing.smartSummariesDesc: Get key points extracted automatically. Perfect for last-minute reviews.
landing.pdfUploadDesc: Upload PDFs and extract text automatically. Works with textbooks and papers.
landing.syncEverywhereDesc: Access your notes on phone, tablet, or web. Real-time sync across devices.
landing.testimonial1: This app saved my GPA! Recording lectures and getting instant flashcards is a game changer.
landing.testimonial2: I went from struggling to straight A's. The AI summaries help me review before exams.
landing.testimonial3: Perfect for my study group! We share notes and quiz each other. Best study app ever.
landing.joinThousandsOfStudents: Join thousands of students already acing their exams with WizNote

privacy.introductionText: Welcome to WizNote ("we," "our," or "us"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our note-taking application and related services. Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the application.
privacy.personalInfoDetails:
• Account Information: Email address, display name, and authentication credentials
• Profile Data: User preferences, theme settings, and notification preferences
• Subscription Information: Premium status, billing details, and payment information
privacy.contentDataDetails:
• Notes: Text content, titles, tags, and metadata you create
• Audio Recordings: Voice recordings and their transcriptions
• AI-Generated Content: Summaries, key details, quizzes, and flashcards created by our AI services
• Shared Content: Notes you choose to share with other users
privacy.usageDataDetails:
• Feature Usage: How you interact with our AI features, recording limits, and premium features
• Device Information: Device type, operating system, and app version
• Analytics Data: App performance, crash reports, and user behavior patterns
privacy.howWeUseInfoIntro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.howWeUseInfoDetails:
• Provide and maintain our note-taking services
• Process audio recordings and generate transcriptions
• Create AI-powered summaries, key details, quizzes, and flashcards
• Manage your account and subscription
• Enforce usage limits and feature restrictions
• Improve our services and develop new features
• Provide customer support
• Ensure security and prevent fraud
privacy.aiIntro: Our application uses artificial intelligence and machine learning services to:
privacy.aiDetails:
• Transcribe audio recordings into text
• Generate summaries of your notes and audio content
• Extract key details and important points
• Create quizzes and flashcards from your content
• Provide intelligent content suggestions
privacy.aiThirdParty: Your content may be processed by third-party AI services (such as Google Gemini) to provide these features. We ensure that any data sent to these services is handled according to their privacy policies and our data protection standards.
privacy.dataStorageDetails:
• Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption
• We use Supabase for secure cloud storage and authentication
• Audio files and transcriptions are encrypted both in transit and at rest
• We implement access controls and monitoring to protect your information
• Regular security audits and updates are performed
privacy.dataSharingIntro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
privacy.dataSharingDetails:
• With your explicit consent (e.g., when you share a note with another user)
• With service providers who assist us in operating our application (under strict confidentiality agreements):
  - Supabase: Cloud hosting, database, and authentication services
  - Stripe: Payment processing for Premium subscriptions (collects payment info, device identifiers for fraud prevention)
  - Google Gemini: AI processing for transcription, summaries, and content generation
• When required by law or to protect our rights and safety
• In connection with a business transfer or acquisition
privacy.stripeNote: Note: Stripe, our payment processor, automatically collects device identifiers and network information to prevent fraud and ensure secure transactions. This is a standard security practice required by payment processors.
privacy.yourRightsDetails:
• Access and download your data
• Update or correct your personal information
• Delete your account and associated data
• Control your privacy settings and preferences
• Opt out of certain data processing activities
• Request a copy of your data in a portable format
privacy.premiumDetails:
• Free users have limited access to AI features and voice recording time
• Premium users enjoy unlimited access to all features
• Usage is tracked to enforce these limits and improve our services
• You can upgrade to Premium at any time through our subscription system
privacy.childrensPrivacyDetails: Our services are not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
privacy.internationalTransfersDetails: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure that such transfers comply with applicable data protection laws and implement appropriate safeguards to protect your information.
privacy.changesToPrivacyDetails: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacy.contactUsIntro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
privacy.contactUsDetails:
• Email: privacy@wiznote.app
• Through our in-app support system
• By visiting our support page in the application
privacy.effectiveText: This Privacy Policy is effective as of {{date}} and will remain in effect except with respect to any changes in its provisions in the future, which will be in effect immediately after being posted on this page.

terms.acceptanceOfTermsText: Welcome to WizNote. By accessing or using our note-taking application and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our application. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time, and your continued use of the application constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.descriptionOfServiceIntro: WizNote is a note-taking application that provides:
terms.serviceFeatures:
• Text and audio note creation and management
• AI-powered transcription services for audio recordings
• Automated generation of summaries, key details, quizzes, and flashcards
• Cloud storage and synchronization across devices
• Note sharing and collaboration features
• Premium subscription features with enhanced capabilities
terms.serviceModification: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time, with or without notice.
terms.accountRegistrationIntro: To use WizNote, you must create an account. You agree to:
terms.accountRequirements:
• Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
• Maintain and promptly update your account information
• Keep your password secure and confidential
• Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
• Be at least 13 years of age (or the minimum age required in your jurisdiction)
terms.accountResponsibility: You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to protect your account information.
terms.userContentIntro: You retain all ownership rights to the content you create, upload, or store in WizNote ("User Content"). By using our service, you grant us a limited license to:
terms.userContentLicense:
• Store, process, and display your User Content
• Process your content through AI services to provide features (transcription, summaries, etc.)
• Back up and secure your content on our servers
• Enable sharing features when you choose to share content with others
terms.licenseTermination: This license exists solely to operate and improve our service and terminates when you delete your content or account. We do not claim ownership of your User Content.
terms.acceptableUseIntro: You agree not to use WizNote to:
terms.prohibitedActivities:
• Violate any applicable laws or regulations
• Infringe on intellectual property rights of others
• Upload malicious code, viruses, or harmful software
• Harass, abuse, or harm other users
• Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
• Use automated systems to access the service without permission
• Reverse engineer or attempt to extract source code
• Resell or redistribute our service without authorization
• Store or share illegal, harmful, or offensive content
• Circumvent usage limits or premium features
terms.policyViolation: Violation of this policy may result in immediate termination of your account and potential legal action.
terms.subscriptionTiers: WizNote offers both free and premium subscription tiers:
terms.tierDetails:
• Free Tier: Limited access to AI features and recording time
• Premium Tier: Unlimited access to all features and capabilities
terms.paymentTermsDetails:
• Premium subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis (monthly or annually)
• All fees are non-refundable except as required by law
• You authorize us to charge your payment method for all fees incurred
• Prices may change with 30 days' notice to active subscribers
• Failed payments may result in service suspension or termination
• You can cancel your subscription at any time through the app
terms.cancellationDetails:
• You may cancel your premium subscription at any time
• Upon cancellation, you retain access until the end of the current billing period
• No refunds are provided for partial billing periods
• After cancellation, your account reverts to the free tier
terms.aiServicesIntro: Our AI-powered features, including transcription, summaries, quizzes, and flashcards, are provided "as is" without guarantees of accuracy or completeness. You acknowledge that:
terms.aiServicesDetails:
• AI-generated content may contain errors or inaccuracies
• Transcriptions may not perfectly capture all audio content
• You should review and verify all AI-generated content
• We are not liable for decisions made based on AI-generated content
• AI services may be temporarily unavailable due to technical issues
terms.usageLimitsIntro: Free tier users are subject to usage limits on:
terms.usageLimitsDetails:
• Audio recording time
• AI feature usage (summaries, quizzes, flashcards)
• Storage capacity
terms.fairUse: We reserve the right to enforce fair use policies and may restrict or suspend accounts that engage in excessive or abusive usage patterns, even for premium users.
terms.dataPrivacyText: Your privacy is important to us. Our data collection and usage practices are detailed in our Privacy Policy. By using WizNote, you also agree to our Privacy Policy. We implement industry-standard security measures, but cannot guarantee absolute security. You are responsible for maintaining backups of critical content.
terms.intellectualPropertyIntro: WizNote and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by us and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not:
terms.intellectualPropertyRestrictions:
• Copy, modify, or create derivative works of our software
• Use our trademarks or branding without permission
• Remove or alter any copyright notices
• Claim ownership of any portion of our service
terms.thirdPartyServicesIntro: WizNote integrates with third-party services including:
terms.thirdPartyServicesList:
• Supabase (cloud storage and authentication)
• Stripe (payment processing)
• Google Gemini (AI processing)
terms.thirdPartyDisclaimer: Your use of these services through WizNote is subject to their respective terms and conditions. We are not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or functionality of third-party services.
terms.serviceAvailabilityText: WizNote is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted, secure, or error-free service. We may experience downtime for maintenance, updates, or unforeseen technical issues.
terms.limitationIntro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WizNote and its affiliates shall not be liable for:
terms.limitationDetails:
• Loss of data, profits, or business opportunities
• Indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
• Damages resulting from unauthorized access to your account
• Errors or inaccuracies in AI-generated content
• Service interruptions or data breaches
terms.limitationAmount: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim, or $100, whichever is greater.
terms.indemnificationText: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless WizNote, its affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, and employees from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including legal fees) arising from:
terms.indemnificationReasons:
• Your use of the service
• Your violation of these Terms
• Your violation of any third-party rights
• Your User Content
terms.terminationIntro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for:
terms.terminationReasons:
• Violation of these Terms or our policies
• Fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activity
• Extended periods of inactivity
• Non-payment of fees
• Any reason at our sole discretion
terms.terminationDetails: Upon termination, your right to access and use WizNote immediately ceases. We may delete your account and User Content, though we will attempt to provide reasonable notice when possible. You may also terminate your account at any time through the app settings.
terms.informalResolutionText: If you have any concerns or disputes, please contact us first at support@wiznote.app. We will attempt to resolve the issue informally.
terms.governingLawText: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which WizNote is registered, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
terms.arbitrationText: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of WizNote shall be resolved through binding arbitration, except where prohibited by law. You waive your right to participate in class action lawsuits.
terms.changesToTermsText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or in-app notification. Your continued use of WizNote after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree to the new Terms, you must stop using the service.
terms.severabilityText: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
terms.entireAgreementText: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and WizNote regarding the use of our service and supersede any prior agreements or understandings.
terms.contactInformationIntro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
terms.contactDetails:
• Email: admin@wiznote.app
• Support Email: support@wiznote.app
• Through our in-app support system
terms.effectiveText: These Terms of Service are effective as of {{date}} and will remain in effect except with respect to any changes in its provisions in the future, which will be in effect immediately after being posted on this page.

about.title: About WizNote
about.subtitle: Learn more about your intelligent note-taking companion
about.description: WizNote is a modern, AI-powered note-taking application designed to help you capture, organize, and study your notes more effectively. With features like audio transcription, AI summaries, and automatic flashcard generation, WizNote transforms the way you learn and retain information.
about.featureSmartNoteTakingDesc: Create and organize notes with rich text formatting and media support
about.featureAudioRecordingDesc: Record audio notes and transcribe them with AI-powered speech recognition
about.featurePDFSupportDesc: Import and annotate PDF documents directly within your notes
about.featureFlashcardsQuizzesDesc: Generate study materials automatically from your notes using AI
about.featureAISummariesDesc: Get instant AI-generated summaries and key insights from your notes
about.featureEasySharingDesc: Share notes with secure links and collaborate with others
about.featureCloudSyncDesc: Access your notes anywhere with automatic cloud synchronization
about.featureSecurePrivateDesc: Your data is encrypted and protected with enterprise-grade security
about.footerMadeWith: Made with ❤️ for students and lifelong learners

changelog.subtitle: Track all updates and improvements

deleteAccount.title: Account Deletion Request
deleteAccount.subtitle: Request to delete your WizNote account and all associated data
deleteAccount.webSubtitle: Permanently delete your account and data
deleteAccount.whatHappens: What happens when you delete your account?
deleteAccount.consequences:
• All your notes and documents will be permanently deleted
• Your account profile and settings will be removed
• Any active subscriptions will be cancelled
• This action cannot be undone
• Processing time: 24-48 hours
deleteAccount.emailHelpText: Enter the email address associated with your WizNote account
deleteAccount.privacyNote: By submitting this request, you confirm that you want to permanently delete your account and all associated data. You will receive a confirmation email within 24-48 hours.
deleteAccount.alternativeContact: If you're having trouble with this form, you can also email us directly at:
deleteAccount.pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
deleteAccount.errorMessage:
{{error}}

Please email support@wiznote.app directly with your account email ({{email}}) to request deletion.

quizzes.failedToLoadNote: Failed to load note content. Please try again.
quizzes.questionCountBetween: Question count must be between 1 and 50
quizzes.createFirstQuiz: Create your first AI-generated quiz from this note
quizzes.confirmDeleteQuiz: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
quizzes.unansweredQuestions: You have {{count}} unanswered question. Do you want to submit anyway?
quizzes.unansweredQuestionsPlural: You have {{count}} unanswered questions. Do you want to submit anyway?

share.noUsersFound: No users found matching your search

transcription.selectNoteToView: Please select a note to view its transcriptions.

unlock.requestUnlockDescription: Enter your email address to receive an unlock link. This link will allow you to unlock your account if it has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts.
unlock.unlockEmailSent: If an account exists and is locked, we've sent an unlock link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to unlock your account.
unlock.unlockEmailNote: Note: The link will expire in 1 hour. If you don't receive an email, please check your spam folder or contact support.
unlock.failedToSendUnlockEmail: Failed to send unlock email. Please try again or contact support.
unlock.errorRequestingUnlock: An error occurred while requesting unlock. Please try again or contact support at support@wiznote.app
unlock.pleaseWaitVerifying: Please wait while we verify your unlock link...
unlock.accountUnlockedSuccess: Your account has been unlocked successfully! You can now sign in.
unlock.invalidUnlockLink: Invalid unlock link. Missing required parameters.
unlock.accountAlreadyUnlocked: Your account is already unlocked. You can sign in now.
unlock.unlockLinkExpired: Failed to unlock account. The link may have expired. Please request a new unlock link.
